Welcome to AWS User Group Medan! 👋

Hi, terima kasih sudah bergabung di AWS User Group Medan. Welcome aboard!
See you di next event / meetup ya

Sedikit info:
Event-event di AWS User Group Medan terbuka untuk umum, baik sebagai peserta maupun kalau kamu tertarik jadi speaker.
Kalau mau sharing atau jadi speaker, silakan isi speaker interest form berikut ini:
👉 https://bit.ly/awsugmedan-speaker

Tentang AWS User Group Medan
AWS User Group Medan adalah bagian dari Global AWS User Group:
👉 https://aws.amazon.com/developer/community/usergroups/

Komunitas ini jadi tempat ngumpulnya orang-orang yang tertarik dan passionate soal Amazon Web Services (AWS) mulai dari developer, architect, sampai users. Di sini kita sharing insight, diskusi, dan belajar bareng, termasuk dari para praktisi di dunia AWS.

Belum expert di AWS? Belum pernah pakai sama sekali? Masih mahasiswa? Atau bahkan bukan developer? Totally fine.
Semua boleh join ke event-event kita. Tujuan utama komunitas ini simpel: belajar bareng dan saling sharing insight.
Jadi nggak usah worry soal level, background, atau pengalaman — datang aja, kita grow bareng

💬 AWS Community Medan WhatsApp Group
Kita menggunakan WhatsApp sebagai community hub untuk event updates, discussion, knowledge sharing dengan real-time dan diskusi santai, feel free join di sini:
https://chat.whatsapp.com/EPgcqAkyq5j15KcniOo7rV

📌 Cek event-event kami:
• Past events:
https://www.meetup.com/aws-user-group-medan/events/?type=past
• Upcoming events:
https://www.meetup.com/aws-user-group-medan/events/?type=upcoming

Contact Person (CP)
• Albert Suwandhi — albertsuwandhi@gmail.com
• Ifan Jaya Suswanto Zalukhu — ivan.zalukhu97@gmail.com

Sekali lagi, welcome — semoga betah dan semoga ketemu offline juga 😄☁️

Welcome!!!

I’m so glad you’re here. For real...!!!

Habits That Stick is all about taking that first step and building small, consistent habits that lead to big shifts in life, career, and well-being. This is a women-only, action-driven community where we show up for ourselves and each other, engage in real conversations, practical strategies, and accountability.

I created this group to help you if you are feeling stuck or searching for the right habits and strategies to make real progress. This is my way of giving back: supporting women in building the habits and systems that will shape their future and unlock their potential.

What You Can Expect:
☕ Occasional in-person meetups over a morning coffee & sundowners ***
🎯 Focused discussions to help identify habits that help us achieve our goals
🔥 Accountability and support in a space to share wins, challenges, and keep each other on track

*** I found that the majority find online catch-ups more practical and convenient

💡 To get started:

1️⃣ What’s your first focus? Send me a quick message and let me know what brought you here! Are you looking to build better money habits, create more balance in your day, finally ditch the snooze button, drink more water, or carve out time for yourself without feeling guilty? Or maybe it’s something else entirely; whatever it is, I’d love to hear what’s on your mind!

2️⃣ Check out the next meetup! Dates are announced regularly, so RSVP when you're ready to join in.

3️⃣ Come as you are. Whether you’re just starting or already working on a habit, this is a space to learn, grow, and take the next step forward.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out. Looking forward to meeting you soon!

See you at the next Meetup,
Ana

We hit the best pubs, laugh hard, and celebrate wins together. Show up, play fair, and help out when you can so the fun keeps rolling. Anything less and you’re out.

House Rules:
Have fun. We play hard, but we’re not playing for sheep stations.

Commitment matters. No-shows and repeat last-minute cancellations, 3 strikes and you’re permanently out.

Stay active. Attend at least once every 6 months or be removed.

Prizes. Team winnings go into shared food on next visit; individual prizes are yours to keep. Cash prize to be split equally amongst winning team.

Looking forward to meeting you 🙂

Welcome to AWS User Group Pangasinan!

Hi there, and welcome to the AWS User Group Pangasinan!
We’re excited to have you join our growing community of cloud builders, developers, IT professionals, and tech learners here in Pangasinan.

This group is all about learning together, sharing knowledge, and building meaningful connections. Whether you’re new to AWS or already working with cloud technology, you’ll find a supportive community that’s ready to help you grow.

What You Can Expect

Regular meetups, tech talks, and hands-on workshops

Real-world discussions about AWS tools, services, and best practices

Opportunities to collaborate on projects and share your expertise

Certification study groups for beginners and advancing learners

A welcoming space to ask questions, contribute ideas, and network with others in the local tech ecosystem

How to Get Started

✔ Introduce yourself — tell us your background or what you want to learn
✔ Join our upcoming events
✔ Participate in discussions and share what you're working on
✔ Feel free to ask questions — this community loves helping each other

Our Vision

We’re building a strong, empowered cloud community in Pangasinan — one that supports learning, encourages collaboration, and creates opportunities for local talent.
Your presence helps make that vision possible.

Once again, welcome aboard! We’re glad you’re here, and we can’t wait to learn and build with you.

— AWS User Group Pangasinan Leadership Team

Please browse all those upcoming and select a few to attend. Dinners, movie nights, theatre nights, dog walking, karaoke, dancing and drinks are all examples of some of the Events your charming Couchie (volunteer) hosts are happy to organize. Venue suggestions are always welcomed! Please ensure that your Meetup profile includes a headshot of YOU - not your pet, coffee cup, your entire family etc. ;) We need to be able to identify and greet everyone properly! Do the right thing and change your RSVP to NOT ATTENDING if you can no longer come along. The bar & pub events in particular are usually at capacity before the actual day. You are able to WAITLIST for an event, which means that the event is full, but Meetup will let you know if others cancel thus creating a spot for your single self to come along. Feeling nervous about all of this? No need! Couchies is a no fuss group of singles who just enjoy getting out as part of a group. If you can't face turning up the first time alone, most events will allow you to bring a plus one. Direct message any one of the hosts with your queries and introduce yourself to them on the night also. After that, it's your time to re-discover those long lost social skills and join in the chat. :) See you out there! Wayne (Owner) Andrea & John (Admin/Hosts)
